description: Single source of truth for the kit's prerequisites (tools, MCP servers, session skills). Read by scripts/preflight.sh (phase 0); cited by README.md and skills/legacy-upgrade/SKILL.md. `level` is the migration-pipeline gate: required = phase-0 hard fail, recommended = documented degradation. `requiredBy` lists the skills that hard-require the entry at their own preconditions step; `token` is the string CI expects in each of those skills' compatibility frontmatter (tests/skills/check-frontmatter.py). Add or remove a prerequisite HERE, never in a hard-coded list. Values must not contain tab characters (tab is the internal field separator).

tools.name: python3
tools.hint: required by the kit's scripts (inventory, dashboard)

tools.name: Chrome headless
tools.test: command -v google-chrome || command -v chromium || test -x '/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome'

mcps.name: RoselineMCP connected
mcps.hint: claude mcp add roseline … (mandatory for all C# analysis)

mcps.name: context7 MCP connected
mcps.hint: recommended: up-to-date docs for the target frameworks

sessionSkills.name: superpowers (brainstorming, writing-plans, using-git-worktrees, subagent-driven-development)
sessionSkills.when: brainstorm/plan/worktree/TDD machinery for the lifecycle skills
